scope: repository-controlled static-analysis and fuzzing evidence plan only
research_basis: EMVCo public L1/L2 material frames L2 testing around kernel compliance with EMV specifications.
EMVCo contact kernel approval material frames approval as attestation of kernel compliance.
Rust fuzzing guidance identifies cargo-fuzz as the Rust wrapper for libFuzzer.
LLVM documents libFuzzer as an in-process coverage-guided fuzzing engine.

static_analysis_gates.evidence_required: rustfmt version, rustc version, command line, clean exit status
clippy version, rustc version, target triple, feature set, clean exit status
source commit, command line, clean exit status

fuzz_surfaces.seed_corpus: valid record template plus truncated high-tag, long-length, duplicate nested, and oversize samples
fuzz_surfaces.objective: no panic, bounded parse failure, and deterministic acceptance for valid BER-TLV inputs

fuzz_surfaces.seed_corpus: valid PDOL/CDOL/DDOL snippets plus truncated and zero-prefixed tag samples
fuzz_surfaces.objective: no panic and bounded handling of arbitrary tag-length lists

fuzz_surfaces.seed_corpus: SELECT, GPO, READ RECORD, GENERATE AC, GET RESPONSE, and malformed short APDU samples
fuzz_surfaces.objective: no panic, no length overflow, and no clear sensitive payload emission

fuzz_surfaces.seed_corpus: format 80, format 77, duplicate tag, missing mandatory tag, and status-only response bodies
fuzz_surfaces.objective: no panic and fail-closed parsing for malformed cryptogram responses

fuzz_surfaces.seed_corpus: authorization response code, issuer authentication data, and issuer script template samples
fuzz_surfaces.objective: no panic and bounded script parsing without logging issuer script command data

fuzz_surfaces.seed_corpus: valid Track 2 equivalent shape plus missing separator, non-BCD, and overlong samples
fuzz_surfaces.objective: no panic and no raw PAN or Track 2 value exposure

report_metadata_required.requirement: rustc, cargo, clippy, rustfmt, and target triple versions
cargo-fuzz and libFuzzer versions or lab-accepted equivalent
enabled sanitizer set and platform limitations
seed corpus, generated corpus, and crash corpus digests
per-target duration, iterations, or coverage stopping rule
all crashes, timeouts, leaks, sanitizer findings, fixes, and accepted residual risks

acceptance_rules: repository smoke and plan artifacts are pre-lab evidence only
formal reports must attach tool versions, command lines, corpus hashes, and target runtime budgets
sensitive PAN, PIN, issuer script data, and private CAPK material must not appear in fuzz corpora or logs
every crash, timeout, sanitizer finding, or parser divergence must have a fixed reproducer or accepted residual-risk record
